In the meantime, if you'd like to temporarily adjust the brightness of your screen or use a third-party browser extension to enable dark mode, that might help with eye strain at night.

incoming_email: How do I add a new team member to my workspace?
reference_reply:
Hi,

Thanks for reaching out! Adding a team member is easy.

1. Go to your 'Workspace Settings'.
2. Click on the 'Team' tab.
3. Click the 'Invite Member' button in the top right corner.
4. Enter their email address and select their role.

They will receive an email invitation to join your workspace. Let me know if you need help with anything else!

Best,
Support Team
generated_reply:
Hi there,

To invite a new team member to your workspace, please follow these steps:

1. Log in to your account and navigate to the "Members" tab.
2. Click on "Add Member".
3. Enter their email address or username.
4. Choose their permissions level (e.g., Admin, Editor, Viewer).
5. Send them an invitation.

They'll receive an email with a link to join your workspace. Once they accept, they'll have access to the shared tasks and projects.

If you need any assistance, feel free to reply!

Best,
Support Team

incoming_email: I'm no longer using this service. Please delete my account and all my data.
reference_reply:
Hello,

I'm sorry to see you go! I can certainly help you with that.

For security reasons, we require you to initiate the account deletion process from within your account. Please log in, go to 'Account Settings' -> 'Privacy', and click 'Delete Account'.

This will permanently delete all your data, which cannot be undone. If you need any assistance with this, please let me know.

Best,
Support Team
